query:
ALTER TABLE training_modules 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS category VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'general',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duration INT DEFAULT 30,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
